neighborhoods.name: Downtown Grand Forks
neighborhoods.description: Rebuilt downtown after the 1997 flood with new infrastructure, university influence, and Town Square
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Grand Forks. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Grand Forks

neighborhoods.name: South Grand Forks
neighborhoods.description: Growing residential area with Columbia Mall, newer schools, and family amenities
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Grand Forks's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Grand Forks

neighborhoods.name: East Grand Forks (MN)
neighborhoods.description: Minnesota-side sister city with lower property taxes and small-town atmosphere
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Grand Forks

neighborhoods.name: North / UND Area
neighborhoods.description: Neighborhoods near University of North Dakota with academic influence and community parks
neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Grand Forks
